steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to use the notes to explain what national union federations do. The key detail in the notes is that the MTUC 'helps improve conditions for workers in that nation.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — identifying the MTUC by country: names where the MTUC operates but says nothing about its purpose. ✗
  • Choice B — describing federation structure: focuses on how the federation is organized, not what it does for workers. ✗
  • Choice C — national federations improve worker conditions: directly states the purpose using the MTUC as the supporting example. ✓
  • Choice D — listing member unions: identifies components of the federation rather than explaining its purpose. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
